---
title: "Cuenta de Bioeconomía de Panamá"
author:
  - name: "Renato Vargas"
    id: rv
    affiliation: 
      - name: "Consultant for The World Bank"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    html-math-method: katex
    # css: styles.css
  docx:
    reference-doc: custom-reference-doc.docx
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    syntax-highlighting: github
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---
